name: Chaotic Sound Effects
description: Creates an endless five-track stereo collage from a library of 1,260 sound effects.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self'; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
